pageContext.name: 1943 x RepliCade Overhaul Edition
pageContext.description: 1943 x RepliCade Overhaul Edition Scaled Replica is a miniaturized 1:6 scale replica of CAPCOM's Dynamo factory 1943 arcade machine presented by Sideshow and New Wave™! Featuring two fully-playable, classic arcade games designed by Yoshiki Okamoto: 1942 and 1943: The Battle of Midway. Our 1943 Overhaul Edition features a diecast metal coin door, security bar, and padlock, microswitch bat-top joystick and buttons, yellow T-molding, customizable operator dip-switch settings, and a bonus 1943 Mini Arcade Stick included in rear storage compartment! Each 1943 Overhaul Edition is individually numbered, and the production run is limited to just 3,000 units. Order now!
